# @platform/observability

Observability abstraction: structured logging, metrics emission, distributed tracing spans, and health check interface.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/observability
Version: 0.1.0
Component: observability
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: observability-core
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define the canonical structured logger, metrics emitter, and tracer interfaces
- Provide a health check registration interface for runtime processes
- Decouple all platform packages from specific observability vendors
- Serve as the single import point for logs, metrics, and traces across the platform

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement a specific observability backend (owned by adapters-sentry, adapters-opentelemetry)
- Does not own alerting rules or dashboards
- Does not collect business metrics — only platform-level signals

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by all runtime and adapter packages needing logs, metrics, or traces
- Concrete adapters (adapters-opentelemetry, adapters-sentry) implement the interfaces defined here

## Operational notes

- Replace the no-op default implementations with concrete adapters before deploying to staging or production
- All structured log fields must follow the platform log schema to ensure queryability
